name: Nectarine & Mascarpone Tartlets
recipeIngredient: 7 Tablespoons Chilled Butter, Cut Into Pieces
recipeInstructions:
FOR CRUST: Combine flour, sugar, lemon peel, and salt in a food processor. Add butter and process using on/off turns until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Add egg yolk and water; process until large moist clumps form. Wrap dough in plastic and chill for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into quarters. Form each into a ball, then roll out to 6-inch rounds. Transfer to 4-inch tartlet pans. Gently press dough into place. Trim edges. Pierce the bottom of the crusts all over with a fork. Freeze for 15 minutes.
Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Bake the crusts until golden, about 15 minutes. Cool completely.
FOR GLAZE: Combine all glaze ingredients in a heavy saucepan. Bring to a boil and strain. Allow to cool slightly.
FOR FILLING: Whisk all filling ingredients except the nectarines together in a bowl. Brush the inside of each tart shell with some of the glaze. Divide the filling among the crusts and arrange the nectarine slices on top. Brush remaining glaze over the top. Refrigerate until the filling is set, about 30 minutes. Remove tartlets from pans and garnish with fresh mint if desired.
